macaroni-with-grilled-vegetables-and-cre.name: Macaroni With Grilled Vegetables And Cream Cheese
macaroni-with-grilled-vegetables-and-cre.original_name: Μακαρονάκι με ψητά λαχανικά και κρέμα τυριού
instructions: Add the milk to a pot first, stick the clove in the onion and pour it into the milk.
Let it warm and perfumed. Throw the onion.
Heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the flower. Mix with wire and cook for 2′-3′.
We're pulling out of the dorm. Add some hot milk, always stirring.
Put the cream back on the fire to tie for 2′-3′ stirring. Perfume with nutmeg and salt.
We withdraw from the fire. Add the graviera and mix.
Add all the vegetables into a sheet, salt and pepper and sprinkle with olive oil.
Mix and baking in a preheated oven at 200 °C for 10′′.
Boil the pasta 5′-6′′ and drag.
With a little water from what is dripping (not completely drained) add them to the cheese cream.
Add the grilled vegetables, mix them well and try to see if they want another salt and pepper.
Put them in a fireproof vessel and sprinkle them with the rest of the graviera.
If we want, sprinkle with bread crumbs and some toast.
Leave them for 20′ at 180
Serve with a spoon, not cut into pieces when hot.

make-ahead-blueberry-cinnamon-muffins.name: Make-ahead Blueberry-cinnamon Muffins
instructions: Whisk together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and nutmeg in a bowl until well combined.

Whisk together white sugar, brown sugar, and melted butter in a second, larger bowl until well combined. Whisk in eggs, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and almond extract until thoroughly combined. Add in milk and sour cream and beat until mixture is smooth, and no lumps remain. Pour in dry ingredients and fold in a few times until just moistened; there should still be some clumps of dry flour. Sprinkle blueberries over the batter, and fold in until just incorporated. Batter will be lumpy, but should not have patches of dry flour remaining in it. Do not overmix.
Place batter in the refrigerator for 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease two 12-cup muffin tins and line with paper liners.
In a small bowl, stir together turbinado sugar and cinnamon.
Fill each muffin liner to the top with the batter. Sprinkle sugar and cinnamon mixture over the top of each muffin.

Bake in the preheated oven until muffins are golden and spring back lightly when touched, 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing to a wire rack to cool completely.

maple-and-honey-caramel-corn.name: Maple And Honey Caramel Corn
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Line 1 or 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Combine butter, brown sugar, turbinado sugar, maple syrup, and honey in a 1 1/2- to 2-quart saucepan over low heat. Stir continuously until mixture begins to simmer; let simmer on low, 4 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add vanilla extract and baking soda at once. Stir to combine.

Place popcorn in a warm mixing bowl and coat by drizzling caramel sauce over corn while stirring using a heavy metal spoon, making sure to stir slowly and not allowing hot caramel on hands. Place onto the prepared baking sheet, using an additional baking sheet if you're worried it is piled too high.
Bake in the preheated oven until crispy, about 40 minutes, removing every 10 minutes to stir corn.
Remove from the oven and place the tray on a wire rack to cool, about 15 minutes.

maple-blueberry-parfait.name: Maple Blueberry Parfait
instructions: Cook 2 1/4 cups (3/4 pound) blueberries with 1/2 cup maple syrup in a 2-quart heavy saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until blueberries have burst, 3 to 8 minutes. Cool in an ice bath, stirring occasionally.
While blueberry mixture cools, beat cream with remaining 1/4 cup maple syrup in a bowl using an electric mixer until it just holds stiff peaks.
Stir lemon juice and remaining 1 1/4 cups blueberries into cooled blueberry-maple mixture.

Spoon about 2 tablespoons blueberry mixture into each of 6 glasses and top with half of crumbled cookies and half of whipped cream. Repeat layering of remaining blueberry mixture, crumbled cookies, and whipped cream.
Serve parfaits immediately.

margarita-bread-argiro.name: Margarita Bread

ingredients.item: 1 sachet dry yeast (or 1 cube 25 g fresh yeast)
1 sachet dry yeast (or 1 cube 25 g fresh yeast)

instructions: Mix the flour with yeast in the mixer's bowl.

Add the lukewarm milk, water (beware of temperature) and honey and work the mixture with the hook attachment, at first at low speed for 3 minutes and then in medium to strong for 5-6 minutes, until we have a soft and fluffy dough that does not stick to the hands.
Finally, add the butter and salt and knead for 1-2 minutes to fully integrate.

The whole process can be done without a mixer: After mixing the ingredients well in the bowl, we finish the dough on the work bench working the mixture with hands for 10 minutes. Collect the compounds below and transfer the dough into a slightly oiled bowl.
Cover it with membrane and let it double in volume for about 2 hours.
Empty the duck on the counter and make it into a dick long roll – if sticky, rub with some olive oil or melted butter.
Cut the roll into seven equally sized pieces to form the margarita bread. If we have scales, we calculate 120 grams apiece.
Make a piece of dough in round ball.
We collect the compounds below and touch it in the center of an anti-stick paper round pan, 28-30 cm diameter.

We also create the remaining six pieces, which we place around the central, 2 cm apart, thus giving the bread the shape of the margarita. Cover well and leave it in a hot spot for 45 minutes, double in volume.
Dissolve the honey in the hot water and, with the help of a brush, brush thoroughly the surface of the bread.
Sprinkle with sesame and allow for 5 minutes to stretch the dough that shrunk with the spread again.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 180°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for 25-30 minutes.
Allow the bread to stand for 10 minutes on the baking pan before dissipating.

marinated-feta.name: Marinated Feta
instructions: Place feta cheese in a glass jar. Add chile pepper, herbes de Provence, and lemon zest. Fill jar with olive oil so feta is completely covered and seal.
Marinate in a cool place, but not in the refrigerator, for 3 to 4 days. Remove chile pepper before serving.

matcha-neapolitan-ice-cream-cake-roll.name: Matcha Neapolitan Ice Cream Cake Roll

ingredients.item: Scoops tillamookⓡ oregon strawberry ice cream
Scoops tillamookⓡ vanilla bean ice cream

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Line a half-sheet pan with parchment paper and grease with nonstick spray. Set aside.
Make the cake: In a medium bowl, combine the egg yolks and ¼ cup sugar. Whisk vigorously for about 5 minutes, or until ribbons form.

In a large bowl, whip the egg whites with an electric mixer for about 6 minutes, or until stiff peaks form. Gradually add the remaining ¼ cup sugar to the egg whites and continue to whip for another 2-3 minutes.
Add about 1 cup stiff egg whites to the beaten egg yolks and whisk until well combined. Fold the egg yolk mixture into the remaining stiff egg whites until fully incorporated.

In a separate medium bowl, sift together the cake flour, matcha powder, and baking powder. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture and fold until incorporated. Fold in the warmed milk until combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly with a spatula. Be sure that the batter is completely flat and even.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.

Remove the pan from the oven and lay a sheet of parchment paper on top of the hot cake. Place another half-sheet pan over the parchment paper and invert the pans while wearing oven mitts. Lift the top pan, gently peel away the parchment paper from the cake, and lay a clean sheet of parchment paper over the cake. Using the backside of a baking sheet, sandwich the cake between the parchment and both baking sheets and invert once more. Remove both baking pans and the top layer of parchment. The cake should now be on the counter with a bottom sheet of parchment.

Trim ½ inch off the two short ends of the cake. Starting at one of the short ends, use your hands to slowly roll up the cake with the parchment paper and place it seam-side down. Cover the roll with a dish towel and let sit for 30 minutes.

Unroll the cake with the short ends facing left and right. Leaving a 2-inch border on each short end side, add the TillamookⓇ Mudslide Ice Cream, TillamookⓇ Oregon Strawberry Ice Cream, and TillamookⓇ Vanilla Bean Ice Cream scoops vertically down the cake with ¾-½ inch between each flavor. Spread the ice cream flat, meshing the flavors together.

Starting at the Mudslide side, roll the cake up and push down on the cake once you get to the seam. Wrap the cake in parchment paper and twist the ends of the parchment to hold its shape. Transfer to a long plate or baking sheet and freeze for at least 3 hours or overnight.
Twenty minutes before serving, make the ganache: In a microwave-safe bowl, combine the white chocolate chips and cream. Microwave for 30-40 seconds and stir until smooth.
Unwrap the cake and place on a cutting board. Spread the ganache over the top of the cake and dust with matcha powder. Allow the ganache to set before slicing into 8 pieces.
Enjoy!
Recipe inspired by:
https://tasty.co/recipe/neapolitan-ice-cream-cake-roll

matzo-granola-with-walnuts-and-coconut.name: Matzo Granola With Walnuts And Coconut
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C and line a large rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk together the vegetable oil, honey, maple syrup, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl. Add the matzo and stir to completely coat.

Spread the granola on the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 10 minutes. Add the walnuts and coconut and stir to combine. Bake, stirring once, until the matzo browns and the walnuts and coconut are toasted, 10 to 12 minutes more. (The mixture will look wet; don’t worry, it will crisp up as it cools.)

Remove the baking sheet from the oven and immediately transfer the granola to a large heat-safe bowl. Stir in the raisins. Let cool completely, stirring occasionally to break up any large clumps. Store in an airtight container for up to 1 week.

meat-pie-with-puff-pastry-teleculinaria.name: Meat Pie With Puff Pastry
meat-pie-with-puff-pastry-teleculinaria.original_name: Empadão de carne com massa folhada
instructions: Peel the onion and garlic tooth, pick them finely and praise them in a frying pan with the olive oil along with the grated carrot. Add the meat and sausage and let it cook until the meat starts to blush. Season with salt and pepper, add tomato pulp and mix well. Let it cook for another two minutes.
On a refractory tray, put a layer with the mashed potatoes on the bottom. Spread the meat on top and reserve.

After thawed, extend the leafy dough on a floury surface and cover the meat with it. Take risks in the dough, as you see in the image, and brush with the egg beaten. Bring it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 15 minutes, until the dough is stained. Serve Next

meat-stuffed-with-vegetables-teleculinar.name: Meat Stuffed With Vegetables

ingredients.item: 1 kg  naco de vitela para assar

instructions: Com uma faca, corte o naco de vitela no sentido do comprimento e abra-o. Tempere com sal e pimenta e reserve.

Light a pot with some olive oil, add the onion and chopped garlic and let it saute. Remove and reserve. Rake or pinch the carrot and curgete and add to the onion by mixing everything until you get a paste. Fill the meat with this paste, close and tie it to the kitchen wire.

Lay the white wine and some olive oil on an oven tray and have the stuffed meat on top. Spread the butter over the meat and season with salt and pepper. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 40 minutes or until you are at the desired point. Serve with accompaniment to taste.

meatballs-in-spanish-sauce-pequerecetas.name: Meatballs In Spanish Sauce

ingredients.item: 500 g de carne picada (mitad cerdo, mitad ternera)

instructions: In a big bowl, mix minced meat with egg, garlic, onion, frosted bread, parsley, salt and pepper. Fold well till all ingredients are well integrated. It forms small balls with the mixture and paddle them for flour.
Fry the meatballs in a frying pan with hot olive oil till they are golden. If you prefer, you can fry your meatballs with an air fryer as well. Keep them on a plate with absorbing paper.

We peel and pat the onion and the leek and carrot and put them to a pint with extra virgin olive oil and some salt at medium heat. When they start golden we add the flour and mix and let them cook. We dissolve the cattle into the water (this is an ox concentrate) and we add to the pan, with the bay leaf, a nail and some pepper. We let them cook about 25 or 30 minutes gently. We remove the laurel and the nail and shredded with the beaker.
Put the meatballs in the saucer with the salsa and cook with low heat for about 10-15 minutes, or until the meatballs are well cooked and the salsa has been weighed.

mediterranean-cod-yachni-argiro.name: Mediterranean Cod Yachni
instructions: We'll use cod fillet hearts and make a light sauce with Mediterranean ingredients.
Cut the onion, garlic and tomatoes into thin slices.
Heat a medium pan over medium heat.
Add the olive oil and onion.
Allow the onion to become clear for 2-3 minutes without color.
Add the garlic, capers and olives.
Sauté for 1’ and add the chopped tomatoes.
Add salt and pepper.
Simmer the sauce for 5’.
We touch the cod fillets in the sauce.
With a spoon, pour them with some sauce.
Cover with lid. Lower the heat and cook for 6-7’.
Sprinkle with the chopped parsley at the end.
Add the food and serve the yahni cod in dishes by driving with the sauce.

mediterranean-style-stuffed-chicken-lezz.name: Mediterranean Style Stuffed Chicken
instructions: 1. Crochet redbiberi in the form of cube.
2. Add and mix white cheese, feslene, olive.
3. Fill the chicken meats in the form of the pocket and fill in the mixture of cheese.
4. I kept the edges with curing.
5. Salt, sprinkle the pepper and cook until the front-back girl in the grill.
6. Serve.

meringue-mushrooms.name: Meringue Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Pastry bag and medium round tip

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat egg whites and salt in a medium bowl until foamy. With motor running, gradually add granulated sugar and beat until stiff, glossy peaks form. Add powdered sugar and vinegar and beat until meringue is very dense (peaks should still be stiff and glossy).

Transfer meringue to a piping bag fitted with a medium round tip and pipe 1"-long cones (these will be the mushroom stems) and quarter-size circles (the mushroom caps) onto a parchment-lined baking sheet. Dust mushroom tops with cocoa powder with a fine-mesh sieve and bake, rotating once, until meringues are dry, 1 ½−2 hours.

Using a small paring knife, make a small hole in center of flat side of mushroom tops. Workin one at a time, spread a dab of chocolate on flat side of a mushroom top with a offset spatula and fit smaller end of meringue stem into hole, pressing to adhere. Let chocolate harden.
Do ahead: Mushrooms can be made 3 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

mexican-green-rice-prepare-it-at-home-co.name: Mexican Green Rice: Prepare It At Home
mexican-green-rice-prepare-it-at-home-co.original_name: Arroz verde mexicano: prepáralo en casa

ingredients.item: 1 taza de arroz blanco de grano largo, bien lavado
1 ½ cups of chicken or vegetable stock
1  chile poblano asado, sin piel ni semillas
1/2 taza de espinaca cruda para intensificar el color
1/4 taza de taza de hojas de perejil
1 Jalapeno chili without seeds (optional for increased itching)
A slice of lemon juice to shine at the end
2 cdas de granos de elote dulce (opcional para textura)
1 cda of roasted nuggets (optional for more gourmet)

instructions: Lava muy bien el arroz hasta que el agua salga clara. Esto evita que quede pegajoso.
In a frying pan, heat up the oil and spray the rice with medium heat till it takes a soft golden tone. Reserve.
Roast the village chili directly into the fire or a frying pan and put them in a bag and let them sweat and remove skin and seeds.
In a blender puts the town chili, cilantro, spinach, parsley, jalapeno, onion, garlic, cumin, oregano and half cup of stock. Loan till you get a very fine green blend.
Regresa el arroz a la olla y vierte el licuado colado para eliminar residuos grandes y mejorar la textura final.
Agrega el resto del caldo y mezcla suavemente sin revolver demasiado.
Cooking at medium heat till I start bubbling. It reduces the fire to a minimum, cover and leaves to cook for 15 minutes without unawaking.
After his time, put out his fire and let his face rest for 10 more minutes without opening his cover.
Fits, sponge with a fork, rectifies salt and adds a chorrit of lemon juice to enhance color and taste.
If you decide to add elote and nuggets, put them gently at the end to avoid breaking the rice.

mexican-hash.name: Mexican Hash
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir chorizo in the hot skillet until brown and crumbly, about 3 minutes. Add onion and cook, stirring frequently, until onion is translucent, about 3 minutes. Transfer chorizo-onion mixture to a plate.

Pour oil into the same skillet over medium-high heat. Add frozen potatoes and seasoning salt; toss to coat potatoes in oil, then cook, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are browned and crispy, about 10 minutes.
Add diced tomatoes and chorizo-onion mixture to the skillet; stir gently to mix evenly. Cook for 4 minutes, stirring once halfway. Serve topped with avocado and cilantro.

michelada-beer-cocktail.name: Michelada Beer Cocktail
instructions: Place about ¼ cup salt on a small plate. Rub the rim of a Collins or pint glass (or a 16-ounce Solo cup—no need to get fancy) with one of the lime wedges to moisten it, then dip the rim in the salt to coat.
Combine the tomato juice, lime juice, hot sauce, Worcestershire sauce, Tajín, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl and mix.
Fill the prepared glass about three-quarters full with ice cubes and add the tomato juice mixture. Top with beer and garnish with the remaining lime wedge.

minced-meat-baked-potato-recipe-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Baked Potato Recipe

ingredients.item: You can increase the number of servings using the middle of potato instead of potatoes.
You can change some of the potatoes with sweet potatoes.
You can use chicken or turkey meat instead of scaling.
A version of Vejetaryen can add berries, lentil or robbean rather than of interior

You can use olive oil or margarine instead of butter.
You can get different tastes with red pepper pickled, cornish pickled or olive instead.
Mayonez and ketç you can use yogurt sauce or mustal sauce rather than of the place.
Sandpirin Drink Corn, Chicken peas or reindeed carrot you can increase the nutrient by adding.
u can enrich aroma and visualness by spreading fresh parsley, dereotu or green onion.

instructions: 1. Wash the potatoes thoroughly, wrap the aluminium foil.
2. Öpreheated from 200°C to 40–50 minutes, bake from the oven crack.
3. Take liquid oil to the pan, roast the meat.
4. Add onion and pepper, continue roasting.
5. Add tomato and spices, cook the water until &ccedil.
6. From the oven to the cut down the length of hunger, to the spaste theatalla.
7. Drink add butter and salt to push.
8. Fill out the i&ccedil of potatoes; with mint.
9. Sprinkler corn and grated cheese.
10. With pickled, swimonnaise or ketchup.
11. 11. Take the oven again and warm up to 5–10 minutes of bake cheese until soon.

miso-brown-butter-rice-cakes-with-corn.name: Miso-brown-butter Rice Cakes With Corn
instructions: Rinse 1 lb. cylindrical Korean rice cakes (about 2½" long) under cool running water. Drain and pat dry with a kitchen towel. Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook rice cakes, shaking pan occasionally, until golden brown and crisp underneath, 7–10 minutes (rice cakes may clump and that is normal), and transfer to a plate.
Meanwhile, separate dark green parts from 6 scallions and thinly slice; set aside. Cut white and pale green parts crosswise into 1" pieces.

Cook 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, in same pan over medium-high heat until golden brown and nutty, about 45 seconds. Add white and pale green parts of scallions and 3 cups fresh corn kernels (from about 3 large ears); cook, stirring occasionally, until corn is blistered in spots, 6–8 minutes. Add 3 Tbsp. white or yellow miso, 2 tsp. rice wine vinegar, 1 tsp. soy sauce, and ¾ cup water; smash miso with a heatproof rubber spatula to dissolve. Bring sauce to a simmer; cook until sauce thickens and clings to corn, about 2 minutes.

Return rice cakes to pan and add 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper, 1 tsp. toasted sesame oil, and remaining 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces; cook, tossing often, until rice cakes are coated, about 2 minutes. Taste and season with kosher salt.
Divide rice cakes and sauce among shallow bowls; top with reserved dark green scallion parts.

mixed-berry-bars-with-brown-sugar-crust.name: Mixed Berry Bars With Brown Sugar Crust

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Line a 13x9" baking pan with parchment paper, leaving overhang on long sides. Pulse 2 cups (250 g) all-purpose flour, 1 cup (2 sticks) chilled unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, ¼ cup (50 g; packed) light brown sugar, ¼ cup (28 g) powdered sugar, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a food processor until mixture is crumbly and largest pieces of butter are pea-size. Scrape into prepared baking pan. Using a flat-bottomed measuring cup, press firmly and evenly onto bottom and partially up sides.

Bake crust until golden around the edges, 20–25 minutes.
Do ahead: Crust can be baked 2 days ahead. Let cool; store tightly covered at room temperature.

Bring ¼ cup plus 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 cups fresh blackberries, 2 cups fresh blueberries, and ½ cup (100 g) granulated sugar to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until berries have collapsed and mixture is saucy, 10–12 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl or measuring glass, pressing on solids; discard solids. (You should have about 2 cups berry purée.)

Whisk together 1 Tbsp. cornstarch and remaining 1¼ cups (250 g) granulated sugar in a small bowl. Whisk berry purée, 4 large egg yolks, and 3 large eggs in a clean medium saucepan to combine. Whisk in cornstarch mixture and cook over low heat, whisking constantly, until mixture is thick enough that wires of whisk leave a trail, 5–7 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in 1 Tbsp. finely grated lemon zest and ½ cup (1 stick) chilled unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, until incorporated.

Scrape filling into crust and spread into an even layer with
an offset spatula. Bake until filling is just set, 18–20 minutes. Decorate with
blueberries and blackberries. Let cool, then chill at least 2 hours.

Cut into a 5x3 grid to form 15 squares.
Do ahead: Bars can be baked 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

mixed-berry-cobbler.name: Mixed Berry Cobbler

ingredients.prep: use no more than 1 1/2 cups strawberries; halved if large

ingredients.item: Unbleached all-purpose flour plus more for surface
Chilled whole milk plus more for brushing

instructions: Position a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 400°. Whisk sugar and cornstarch in a large bowl. Add berries to bowl and toss to coat. Transfer berry mixture to a 2-quart baking dish about 2" deep. Set aside to macerate while making dough.

Whisk 1 1/3 cups flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Add butter; using fingertips, rub in butter until coarse meal forms. Add 1/2 cup milk and stir just until dough forms. Gather dough into a ball and transfer to a lightly floured surface. Gently knead 5 or 6 times, then pat or roll dough into a 9x6" rectangle. Cut dough in half lengthwise, then crosswise 3 times, forming 8 rectangles. Arrange biscuits 1/2" apart over fruit. Brush tops lightly with milk and sprinkle with sugar.

Bake until fruit is bubbling and biscuits are just cooked through and golden all over, about 35 minutes. Let cool at least 30 minutes; serve with vanilla ice cream. DO AHEAD: Cobbler can be made up to 3 hours ahead. Rewarm at 350° if desired.

mixed-vegetable-frittata-lezzet.name: Mixed Vegetable Frittata

ingredients.item: 50 gr gr gr gr grated parmesan cheese Home

instructions: 1. A good choice between vegetables and recipes.
2. 1 box to pan and sauce with butter.
3. Add and mix eggs in a bowl of pit and salt, pepper and parmesan cheese.
4. Add on vegetables and cook for 20 minutes in jealous fire.
5. Serve hot.
6. Nefis sebzeli frittata tarifini de listenize ekleyin.

mole-verde.name: Mole Verde

ingredients.prep: a squash-like fruit native to Mexico and Central America, can be found at Latin markets and some supermarkets. Masa harina, also known as masa flour, can be found at Latin markets and many supermarkets.

instructions: Place chayote and green beans in a medium pot and add water to cover by 1". Bring to a boil and cook until tender, about 4 minutes. Drain and transfer to a medium bowl.

Cook jalapeños, tomatillos, and garlic in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium heat, turning occasionally, until almost completely blackened, 10–15 minutes. Transfer to separate bowls. Cover jalapeños with plastic and let sit 5 minutes. Remove skins and stems, then cut a slit lengthwise along 1 side and remove seeds and veins. (If you like it spicy, leave a few seeds and veins.) Peel garlic.

Meanwhile, purée masa and 2 cups broth in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a Dutch oven or other large pot set over medium heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until sauce is very thick and you can see the bottom of pot when you stir, about 5 minutes.

Meanwhile, purée jalapeños, tomatillos, garlic, cilantro, parsley, allspice, cloves, cumin, and 1 cup broth in clean blender until smooth. Stir into sauce. Reduce heat to low and cook mole until thickened, about 5 minutes. Add more broth, if sauce gets too thick. For optimal color and flavor, be careful not to overcook. Add chayote and green beans and cook until warmed through. Season with salt and serve with meat or fish of choice.

molotof-with-lemon-teleculinaria.name: Molotof With Lemon

ingredients.item: 115 g of saltless butter at room temperature

instructions: Start by preparing the lemon curd: in a mincer or kitchen robot, throw lemon zest to taste and sugar and crush everything very well. Then beat the butter softened with the previous sugar. Add one egg at a time, lemon juice and salt, without stopping beating.
Lay the previous mixture on a pot and light the light until it begins to thicken. Take it off and let it cool.
Prepare the molotof: beat the clears with the mixer, until they form soft spikes. Add the sugar, little by little, and continue beating until you get firm spikes.
Lay the prepared in a hole form, previously greased with oil. Lay it in the center of the oven tray and pour boiling water on it until it reaches 3/4 of the shape.

Take the tray to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 10 minutes. Turn off the oven and leave the molotof inside, without opening the door, for about 1 hour and 30 minutes to 2 hours. Remove, discard, water with the lemon curd and serve.

monte-cristo.name: Monte Cristo

ingredients.item: Shredded gruyère or swiss cheese (about 1 cup)

instructions: For the batter: In a shallow baking dish or pie plate, whisk flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg until combined. In a small bowl, whisk milk and egg until combined. Whisk milk mixture into the flour mixture until a smooth batter is formed. Batter should be thick enough to coat the back of a spoon; set aside until ready to use.
For the Sandwiches: Place 4 slices of bread on a clean work surface. Spread 2 slices with mayonnaise and 2 slices with mustard. Set aside.

Layer 1/4 cup (about 1 ounce) of the cheese on each mayonnaise-coated bread slice, top with the ham, divided evenly between the 2 slices. Top with the remaining cheese (1/4 cup per sandwich). Close each sandwich with the remaining bread slices, mustard side down. Press firmly to adhere.

Working with 1 sandwich at a time, use a fish spatula and hands to dip and turn the sandwich in the prepared batter to coat evenly. Transfer the sandwich to a large plate and repeat with remaining sandwich.

In a large nonstick skillet, melt butter over medium heat, swirling to coat the pan evenly, until foaming. Carefully transfer the sandwiches to the skillet and cook until golden brown on bottom, 3 to 4 minutes. Using 2 spatulas, carefully flip the sandwiches. Set a cast-iron skillet or Dutch oven directly on the sandwiches to press them. Continue to cook until the bottom side is golden brown, 3 to 4 minutes.

Transfer sandwiches to a clean wire rack set in a rimmed baking sheet and let cool for 5 minutes. Cut sandwiches in half and dust with powdered sugar, if using. Serve with raspberry jam on the side, if using.

multigrain-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Multigrain Chocolate Chip Cookies

ingredients.item: Raw pumpkin seeds (pepitas) and/or sunflower seeds

instructions: Whisk all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in a medium bowl.
Mix chocolate, oats, pumpkin seeds, polenta, and millet in another medium bowl.

Cream butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, powdered sugar, and molasses in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium-high speed, scraping down sides as needed, until mixture is the color of light mocha and very fluffy, 3–4 minutes.
Reduce mixer speed to medium. Add egg, then egg yolks one at a time, waiting for each to incorporate before adding the next. Beat in vanilla, then scrape down bowl again.

Reduce mixer speed to low and slowly beat in dry ingredients until just combined and no visible white flour remains. Fold in chocolate mixture with a spatula until well combined. Cover dough with plastic and chill at least 2 hours.

Place racks in upper and bottom thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper. Using a ¼-cup scoop or dry measuring cup, portion dough into ¼-cup balls (about 2.5 oz. each). Arrange evenly on prepared sheets.

Bake cookies, rotating pans once top to bottom and front to back, until golden brown on top and surface just begins to look matte, 14–18 minutes. Let cool slightly, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely. Repeat with remaining dough and fresh parchment.
Do Ahead: Cookie dough can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

mums-mincemeat.name: Mum's Mincemeat
instructions: Melt suet in a saucepan over medium-low heat; strain liquid through a fine-mesh strainer into a bowl and discard solids. Refrigerate liquid until again solid.
Grate solid suet, measure 12 ounces of grated suet into a bowl, and set aside.
Stir brown sugar, sultana raisins, dark raisins, currants, fruit peel, almonds, allspice, nutmeg, and salt together in a large bowl; add grated suet and stir. Fold grated apple through the mixture.
Cover bowl loosely with aluminum foil and allow it to sit at room temperature, stirring once daily, until fermented, 3 to 5 days. Refrigerate until needed.

mushroom-firik-pilaf-lezzet.name: Mushroom Firik Pilaf
instructions: 1. blend firik bulgur with Bulgur.
2. Roast the onion until the food is chopped with butter and liquid oil.
3. Add pepper paste.
4. After mixing several times, add hot water, boiled nohudu, salt, spices and bulgures.
5. Boil a few stones in high fire first.
6. Then close the cover of the pot.
7. Bake the water until it attracts the water.
8. Over melt butter and roast small chopped mushrooms.
9. Add salt, spices and chopped dereot.
10. Get from January.
11. 11. Open the cover of the saucepan, pour the mushroom mixture.
12. Lightly mix and close the cover of the pan again.
13. Serve after 5 minutes.

mussel-cream-pequerecetas.name: Mussel Cream

ingredients.item: 1 vaso de tomate frito (200 ml aprox.)
400 ml del caldo de cocer los mejillones (o caldo de pescado)
100 ml liquid cream for cooking (at least 18% mg)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva virgen extra para servir

instructions: Limpiamos 1 kg de mejillones frescos retirando barbas y conchas rotas.
Los ponemos en una olla con un dedo de agua, tapamos y cocemos a fuego fuerte 4-5 minutos, hasta que se abran.
We put up the cooking stock and put it back. We remove meat from shells, saving about 8-10 whole mussels to decorate.
In a casserole, we heated up 2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil and revamed 2 leeks and 4 minced carrots till they start to get golden. We add 1 tablespoon of flour, remove and cook 1 minute.

We add 1 glass of fried tomato and the motif of the mussels to complete 400 ml, we mix and lead to boiling. We have been integrating mussel meat and we have been pampering and we have been cooking with medium heat for 10 minutes.

We're tripping with a mixer till we get a fine cream. We add 100 ml of liquid cream to cook, mix well and warm up a few more minutes without boiling so that it doesn't cut. If we want a more seductive texture, we get through a mantle.
Repartimos la crema en cuencos individuales, decoramos con los mejillones enteros, cebollino fresco picado y un chorrito de aceite de oliva virgen extra.

30-minute-burger.name: 30-minute Burger
instructions: Make the pickled red onions: In a small pot, combine the water, apple cider vinegar, salt, sugar, peppercorns, and coriander seeds, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
Turn off the heat and add the sliced onion, making sure they are fully submerged. Let cool to room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
Make the Thousand Island Dressing: In a medium bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, ketchup, pickles, garlic, and vinegar.
In a large bowl, season the ground beef generously with salt and pepper. Use your hands to mix until evenly combined.
Divide the beef into 4 8-ounce portions and form into patties. Place on a cutting board. Use your thumb to press a divot into the center of each burger.
Heat the grapeseed oil in a cast iron or stainless steel skillet over medium-high heat until nearly smoking. Add the burger patties and cook for 3-4 minutes, without disturbing, until browned.
Use a spatula to flip the burgers over and place a slice of cheddar on each one. Cook for another 3-4 minutes, until the burgers are cooked through and cheese has melted.
Place on sesame buns and top with the pickled red onions, Thousand Island Dressing, tomato, and lettuce. Serve with French fries.
Enjoy!
